description: This is a hotel booking website showing search results in a grid layout. Each hotel is displayed as a card with an image, name, location, rating, brief description, and pricing starting from a nightly rate. The interface includes standard booking site elements like ratings, review counts, and 'Show more' buttons for additional details. There's also a section for 'Last minute hotels near you this weekend' at the bottom, suggesting personalized recommendations.

The page displays various destination options in a card-based grid layout, featuring images of different locations like Mexico, Spain, and the United States. Each card contains destination images, titles, and brief descriptions to help users plan their pet-friendly travel. The layout includes a sidebar with additional related suggestions and a comprehensive footer with various travel-related links and options.

The interface features a prominent search form with pickup location, date selection using a dual-month calendar picker showing April and May 2026, and time selection. Below the search area is a carousel displaying available vehicle options including premium, medium, large, and small car categories. The page uses Booking.com's characteristic blue branding with a clean, travel-focused design optimized for rental car bookings.
